subcodes.first_line: The peoples of the earth have, throughout all ages and centuries, awaited and continue to await the effulgences of the Light of Divine Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اهل ارض در قرون و اعصار منتظر تجلیات انوار نیر ظهور الهی بوده و هستند مخصوص
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @knowledge; recognition of God
